result.stderr:
usage: dotnet dslc [--version] [-t <arg>] [-o <arg>] [--output-grammar <arg>]
                   [--output-utilities <arg>] [-r <arg>] [-p <arg>] [-v <arg>]
                   [-w <arg>...] [-s <arg>...] [-n <arg>] [--class <arg>]
                   [--property <arg>] [--] <INPUT_GRAMMAR>

    --version                         Output version and exit immediately. All
                                      other options except --target are
                                      ignored.
    -t, --target <arg>                (Default: NetCore) .Net runtime to
                                      target.  Possible values: NetDesktop,
                                      NetCore.
    -o, --output <arg>                (Default:
                                      "[<NamespacePrefix>.]<DSLName>.[Class].g.cs")
                                      (Incompatible with other output options)
                                      Output file for all generated source
                                      code.
    --output-grammar <arg>            Output file for the generated grammar
                                      source code.
    --output-utilities <arg>          Output file for the generated grammar
                                      utility source code.
    -r, --reference <arg>             Reference metadata from the specified
                                      assembly files
    -p, --path <arg>                  Additional directories to locate
                                      assembly and grammar references,
                                      separated by semicolons.
    -v, --verbosity <arg>             Define verbosity level of messages
                                      printed by the compiler. Possible
                                      values: Silent=0, Errors=1, Warnings=2,
                                      Normal (Errors | Warnings), Debug=4,
                                      Verbose (Normal | Debug).
    -w, --warn-categories <arg>...    (Default: All) Define categories of
                                      warnings/errors that should be
                                      validated. Possible values: None, Core,
                                      Syntax, Semantics, Learning, Features,
                                      All.
    -s, --suppress <arg>...           List of warning ids to suppress,
                                      separated by semicolons.
    -n, --namespace-prefix <arg>      Optional namespace prefix for the
                                      compiled grammar assembly. Will be
                                      prepended to the DSL name.
    --class <arg>                     (Default: "Language") Name of the static
                                      class that will hold the compiled
                                      grammar in the produced assembly.
    --property <arg>                  (Default: "Grammar") Name of the static
                                      property that will hold the compiled
                                      grammar in the produced assembly.
    <INPUT_GRAMMAR>                   Grammar file to compile.
